data.title: Economic Recession Probability Rises in U.S. Stock Market
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan has reported that the probability of an economic recession, as reflected in stocks closely tied to the U.S. economy, has surged to nearly 80%. Despite potential increased financial pressures, credit product investors remain optimistic. JPMorgan's market-based recession indicator dashboard reveals that the Russell 2000 Index, which was heavily impacted by recent sell-offs, currently indicates a 79% chance of recession. Other asset classes are also signaling warnings: the S&P 500 Index shows a 62% probability, basic metals indicate a 68% chance, and 5-year U.S. Treasury bonds reflect a 54% likelihood. In contrast, the investment-grade credit market reflects only a 25% probability of recession, a significant increase from zero last November.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls as Key Deadline Approaches for Trump ‘Reciprocal’ Tariffs
data.description:
The leading cryptocurrency fell on trade-linked jitters, but it did not hit a five-month low seen the day before.
source: https://decrypt.co/313961/bitcoin-falls-as-key-deadline-approaches-for-trump-reciprocal-tariffs

data.title: ‘Chain agnostic’ M^0 stablecoin middleware platform expands to Solana, teams with KAST neo-bank on latest M token extension
data.description:
Ethereum-based M^0 stablecoin platform expands to Solana in the latest showcase of its "chain-agnostic" approach to digital dollar deployments.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350083/chain-agnostic-m0-stablecoin-middleware-platform-expands-to-solana-teams-with-kast-neo-bank-on-latest-m-token-extension?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Dubai Agencies Collaborate to Link Real Estate Registry with Property Tokenization
data.description:
Dubai Land Department and VARA integrate blockchain into real estate, enabling tokenized property ownership to boost liquidity, expand investment access, and align with Dubai's ambitious economic and innovation strategies.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/dubai-links-real-estate-registry-to-tokenization/

data.title: South Korea’s 24-hour trading volume surges on false news of US tariff suspension
data.description:
The South Korean crypto markets experienced a 400% increase in trading volume over the past 24 hours following reports that President Donald Trump was considering a 90-day suspension of tariffs, which also affected South Korean exports. A White House spokesperson has debunked the reports as fake news. Trading activity on South Korean crypto exchanges experienced […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-trading-volume-surges-false-news/

data.title: Solana developers launch new ‘Confidential Balances’ token extensions to improve onchain privacy
data.description:
The new token extensions enable users to confidentially shield balances, transfer tokens and mint or burn assets.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350076/solana-developers-launch-new-confidential-balances-token-extensions-to-improve-onchain-privacy?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Getting Started with Revnets on Juicebox
data.description:
Juicebox V4 brings programmable revenue sharing to Ethereum and L2s through fully autonomous networks called revnets.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/juicebox-revnets

data.title: DOJ Maintains Regulation on Cryptocurrency Exchanges, Opposing Claims
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Justice continues crypto regulation, challenging market rumors of regulatory cessation.
source: https://coincu.com/331032-doj-crypto-regulation-continues

data.title: Lobby Finance Vote-Buying on Arbitrum Raises Alarms Over DAO Security and Governance Integrity
data.description:
Arbitrum DAO faces scrutiny as vote-buying through Lobby Finance sparks debate over decentralized governance, highlighting vulnerabilities in token-weighted voting systems and calls for reform within blockchain-based decision-making processes.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/vote-buying-sparks-arbitrum-dao-vote-security-concerns/

data.title: User spends $10k to control $6.5M in votes on Arbitrum DAO, sparks governance concerns
data.description:
A recent vote-buying incident within Arbitrum DAO has raised concerns about the viability of decentralized governance as investors exploit on-chain mechanisms to acquire influence through borrowed voting power. According to an April 8 report by crypto analyst Ignas, a user identified as hitmonlee. eth spent 5 Ethereum (ETH), approximately $10,000, to obtain 19. 3 million ARB tokens’ […] The post User spends $10k to control $6
source: https://cryptoslate.com/user-spends-10k-to-control-6-5m-in-votes-on-arbitrum-dao-sparks-governance-concerns/
